━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  CENTRAL WORKFLOW — SEMI-AUTONOMOUS v9  |  AI-Workflow-Nutrition
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Mode : Semi-autonome  |  LLM : Ollama llama3 local  |  3 checkpoints humains
Chaque étape génère un rapport TXT lisible  |  Contexte transmis entre chaque étape
Étapes : Design Thinking → Architecture → Production → Test → Sécurité → Déploiement → ZIP Final
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

assignments.name: prompt
prompt
assignments.value:
=AI-Workflow-Nutrition. FULL CENTRALIZED n8n workflow.
CRITICAL: Focus on the real nutrition application architecture only.
Ollama = parsing/reasoning ONLY. Nutrition values = BLV API ONLY.
BLV API: https://api.webapp.prod.blv.foodcase-services.com/BLV_WebApp_WS/webresources/BLV-api

Task: Generate global technical architecture for the nutrition app.
Use ONLY real n8n node types: Manual Trigger, Set/Edit Fields, HTTP Request, Code, Split Out, Merge, Switch, Sticky Note.

Return strict JSON only. No markdown. No code fences.

Expected JSON: {"architecture_style": "", "runtime_pipeline": [{"step": "", "description": "", "n8n_node_type": ""}], "components": [{"name": "", "role": "", "type": ""}], "data_flow": [], "integration_contracts": {"ollama": {"url": "http://host.docker.internal:11434/api/generate", "usage": "parsing only"}, "blv_api": {"base_url": "https://api.webapp.prod.blv.foodcase-services.com/BLV_WebApp_WS/webresources/BLV-api", "endpoints": []}}, "risks": []}

Design summary: {{$json.design_thinking_report}}

assignments.name: prompt
assignments.value:
=AI-Workflow-Nutrition. FULL CENTRALIZED n8n workflow.
CRITICAL: Focus on real nutrition app production specs only.
Do NOT invent BLV endpoints or nutrition values.
Ollama = parsing/reasoning ONLY. Nutrition values = BLV API ONLY.
BLV API base: https://api.webapp.prod.blv.foodcase-services.com/BLV_WebApp_WS/webresources/BLV-api

Task: Generate production specs for each nutrition app user story.
Keep each spec concise. Max 3 items per array.

Return strict JSON only. No markdown. No code fences.

Expected JSON: {"production_specs": [{"user_story_id": "", "frontend_spec": {"component": "", "inputs": [], "outputs": []}, "backend_spec": {"logic": "", "n8n_nodes": []}, "ollama_usage": {"purpose": "", "prompt_template": ""}, "blv_api_calls": [{"endpoint": "", "method": "", "params": {}}]}], "app_structure": {"entry_point": "", "main_workflow": ""}}

Architecture summary: {{$json.architecture_report}}

assignments.name: prompt
prompt
assignments.value:
=AI-Workflow-Nutrition. FULL CENTRALIZED n8n workflow.
Task: Generate a concise security analysis for the nutrition app.
Keep it short: max 3 vulnerabilities, max 3 recommendations.

Return strict JSON only. No markdown. No code fences.

Expected JSON: {"security_score": 0, "vulnerabilities": [{"id": "", "name": "", "severity": "low|medium|high", "description": "", "fix": ""}], "owasp_risks": [], "api_security": {"blv_api": [], "ollama_local": []}, "recommendations": [], "security_checklist": []}

Key risks to evaluate: BLV API exposure, Ollama local endpoint, session management, input validation.
Test summary: {{$json.test_improvement_report}}

assignments.name: prompt
prompt
assignments.value:
=Generate ONLY the content of app.py for a Flask nutrition web application using the Swiss BLV Food API.
Routes needed:
- GET / returns index.html
- GET /search?q= searches Swiss Food API at https://api.webapp.prod.blv.foodcase-services.com/BLV_WebApp_WS/webresources/BLV-api/food?lang=fr&search=QUERY
- POST /api/daily/add adds food to session
- GET /api/daily/get returns daily intake from session
- POST /api/daily/reset clears session

Return ONLY Python code. No explanations. Start with: from flask import
